leadText: Grass Pelt (Japanese: くさのけがわ Grass Pelt) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature Ability of Skiddo and Gogoat.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While Grassy Terrain is active, the Defense of the Pokémon with this Ability is increased by 50%. It does not affect self-inflicted confusion damage. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Grass Pelt has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] While Grassy Terrain is active, the Defense of the Pokémon with this Ability is increased by 50%. It does not affect self-inflicted confusion damage.
